data.name: Eyes on Me
data.detailed_description:
Eyes on Me is an adult, corruption "Influencer" themed game, where you play as Ashley, an innocent new fashion student at a design college. Step into her shoes, as she discovers her own sexuality, uncovers the new world of Adult Social Media and see just how far she will go in order to become popular. The game is a 3D, real-time college life-sim - you will go through quests, advance the story while you try to grow your in-game social media followers by offering them content they want to see and interacting with them in the real world.

Meet various kinky characters around the college, explore sexy story-lines, and learn more about social media and the impact it has on Campus. Learn new poses for pictures and videos, try different outfits and looks, and learn how to grow your popularity. Evolve from an inexperienced girl to an adult influencer star and explore just how far you and Ashley would go to become popular and please random people.

  • A whole adult social media system (a bit like OF), with followers, personalized DMs requests and much more, in which the content you upload is up to you - grow your socials with fetishes you want to show and explore. From basic nudity to pretty extreme kinks.

  • Dozens of unique NPCs to talk to (in the final game version), do quests, have sex with and unlock sexy storylines.

  • Sexual content such as: exhibitionism, voyeurism, group sex, (consensual) bdsm, TFG (transformation) and much much more.

  • Many different outfits to wear and hairstyles to try out to create the hottest Ashley and the sexiest content possible!

  • Grow your presence on social media and get the benefits of being a star!

  • Sexual content is up to you - from “normal” vanilla sex to extreme kinks - whatever you choose to explore and indulge in!

The current state of development is pretty advanced. We already have a vertical slice and it has most of the main mechanics of the game, 1-2+ hours of gameplay to explore already, showing what the game will be, but it also has some bugs, problems and lack of polish. This means we expect to really be able to deliver the full game pretty fast - within just 6-8 months. Upon full release the game will have:

  • Much better animations and sequences/cinematics (we are still missing a full-time animator and the quality lacks in the current build).

  • Many more quests and storylines including a main branch (at the moment it’s separate quest lines - no main one).

  • Upcoming sexual content includes acts such as public use, humiliation, domination and submission, more sexual acts, futa, watersports, and more!

  • Improved mechanics and game-flow.

Mature Content:

All characters depicted in this game are over 18. This game portrays various types of sexual acts. All sexual acts within the game are consensual but some can't be skipped by the player.

data.short_description: Play Ashley as she becomes an adult influencer discovers her sexuality and see just how far you will go to please others. Will you stay an innocent fashion student or transform into an adult star

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: i5 8400
  • 顯示卡: RTX 2060
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: i7 9700
  • 顯示卡: RTX 3060
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
